posts.author: Mykola (Mykola Pustovoychenko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Exciting Release: New Version of the Org Chart App!

What is your app called?
Our app is called Org Chart.

monday.com

Org Chart - monday.com App Marketplace

Visualize relations between the board items in a few clicks

Why did you build this app?
We built the Org Chart app to simplify the way teams visualize and manage the relationships between board items. Many users needed a more intuitive and dynamic way to represent their organizational structures and project hierarchies, and our app solves this challenge with ease.

What does your app do?
The Org Chart app allows you to visualize, organize, and manage the relationships between items on your monday.com boards using an interactive, dynamic org chart view. You can quickly rearrange items, establish connections, and view relationships between items in real-time. It also includes features like saving, exporting, and sharing your org chart views with others for better collaboration.

What example use cases and workflows does this app apply to?

  • Team and Department Org Charts: Visualize company structures, departments, or project teams, and easily manage reporting lines or hierarchy changes.
  • Project Management: Represent task dependencies and hierarchies within large, complex projects.
  • Client or Stakeholder Management: Display client organizations or stakeholder networks to understand relationships and improve communication strategies.
  • Resource Management: Quickly visualize how resources are allocated across teams or projects.

Who are you?
We’re LeanyLabs, a seasoned monday.com developer specializing in building tailored monday.com apps that enhance workplace efficiency for other partners and monday.com users.

How can users use your app?
Simply install the Org Chart app from the monday.com marketplace. Once installed, it’s ready to use on any of your boards—just connect the items you want to visualize, and the app will dynamically create your org chart. You can rearrange items, save custom views, export them for reports, and share them with your team directly.

Are there any dependencies?
There are no specific dependencies for using the Org Chart app. It works on any monday.com plan and doesn’t require additional tools or subscriptions.

Does it have a cost?
Yes, the Org Chart app is a paid app with free tier. You can find the pricing details on the app listing in the monday.com marketplace.
